title: MagicEdenNFTToken
description: An individual NFT token listed or tracked on Magic Eden.

mintAddress.description: The on-chain mint address of the NFT (Solana) or token ID (EVM).

owner.description: Wallet address of the current owner.

supply.description: Token supply (1 for standard NFTs, >1 for semi-fungible tokens).

delegate.description: Delegate wallet address if the token has been delegated.

collection.description: Symbol of the collection this token belongs to.

updateAuthority.description: Authority address that can update the token metadata.

primarySaleHappened.description: Whether the primary sale of this NFT has occurred.

animationUrl.description: URL to an animation or video asset.

externalUrl.description: External URL associated with the NFT.

price.description: Current listing price in SOL or native currency.

listStatus.description: Whether the NFT is currently listed for sale.
